briefdescription.para: renvoie 1 si on est en mode Debog, 0 sinon

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *const msg, const DoubleVect &arr, int num_deb)
memberdef.name: verifier_bord

briefdescription.para: like verifier(), but, in "read&compare" mode, put the reference value found in the file in the ref variable.

detaileddescription.para: x and ref can point to the same object.

briefdescription.para: like verifier(), but, in "read&compare" mode, put the reference value found in the file in the ref variable.

detaileddescription.para: x and ref can point to the same object.

briefdescription.para: like verifier(), but, in "read&compare" mode, put the reference value found in the file in the ref variable.
like verifier(), but, in "read&compare" mode, put the reference value found in the file in the ref variable.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *const msg, const MD_Vector &, const IntVect &)
memberdef.name: verifier_indices_items

briefdescription.para: teste le contenu du vecteur v en supposant qu'il contient des indices d'items associes au descripteur md.

detaileddescription.para: Exemple: face_keps_imposee_ Les valeurs negatives doivent etre identiques a la reference, les valeurs positives ou nulles sont interpretees comme un indice et doivent etre egale a l'indice de reference apres renumerotation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *const msg, const Matrice_Base &, const MD_Vector &md_lignes, const MD_Vector &md_colonnes)
memberdef.name: verifier_matrice
